rule: Every remaining Shell Alpine binding, store access, magic helper, and runtime API family must have an explicit owner, migration boundary, and Svelte/shared shell service target before removal work continues.

migration_classes.bootstrap_only: Legacy Alpine usage that exists only to register shell startup adapters, stores, toasts, or websocket bootstrap glue. Replacement target is a shared shell service bootstrap adapter.
migration_classes.interactive: Legacy Alpine usage that still handles user-visible interaction, page state, menus, drag state, chat state, or component behavior. Replacement target is a Svelte component or shared shell service.
migration_classes.delete_ready: Legacy Alpine usage whose behavior is already replaced and can be removed after a targeted parity check.

rules.target_replacement: Svelte shell layout, page islands, and shared shell services for template event/state ownership
rules.notes: Owns the remaining static template bindings until each slice is replaced by Svelte components wired through shared shell services.

rules.owner_feature: shell API, toast, and websocket bootstrap adapters
rules.target_replacement: shared shell service bootstrap adapters with Svelte consumers
rules.notes: Bootstrap-only Alpine registrations must not grow; final removal happens when toast/error/websocket bootstraps are fully service-owned.

rules.owner_feature: shell app navigation, page routing, and global shell state
rules.target_replacement: Svelte shell root plus shared shell services for navigation and global state
rules.notes: Covers remaining Alpine app bootstrap/page-routing hooks while the Shell root continues moving to Svelte.

rules.owner_feature: agent directory, agent details, filters, and permissions UI
rules.target_replacement: Svelte agent directory and agent details components backed by shared shell agent services
rules.notes: Keeps agent list/detail interaction ownership explicit until the remaining Alpine store and helper usage is retired.

rules.owner_feature: chat runtime, message rendering, drag bars, chat map, and session websocket UI
rules.target_replacement: Svelte chat shell components and shared shell chat services for runtime/session state
rules.notes: This is the highest-risk interactive Alpine owner because it includes session switching, render windows, scroll state, and drag behavior.

rules.owner_feature: overview, logs, runtime, scheduler, sessions, and usage dashboard pages
rules.target_replacement: Svelte dashboard page islands with shared shell services for page actions
rules.notes: Groups low-count dashboard page Alpine calls so they have a clear migration lane without pretending they are deleted.

rules.target_replacement: Svelte wizard/workflow-builder components with shared shell workflow services
rules.notes: Tracks the remaining wizard/workflow-builder Alpine calls until those pages are fully component-owned.
